security_card.title: Security
security_card.has_2fa: Two-factor authentication is active on your account. Manage linked sign-in providers, regenerate recovery codes, or disable 2FA.
security_card.no_2fa: Add an extra step to your sign-in with a TOTP app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password...). Takes under a minute.

password.title: Change Password
password.error: Could not change password. Please check your current password.
password.mismatch: The new password and confirmation don't match.

theme_mode.label: Appearance
theme_mode.hint: Your personal preference — it only affects your account, not other users.
